# stereoOrderReversed

**Type Property**

Changes the default ordering of eye data, switching it from left-to-right to right-to-left.

## Declaration

```swift
static var stereoOrderReversed: CMStereoViewInterpretationOptions { get }
```

## Discussion

Setting the [doc://com.apple.coremedia/documentation/CoreMedia/CMStereoViewInterpretationOptions/stereoOrderReversed] flag changes interpretations of geometry and affects internal storage.

## Stereo View Options

- **additionalViews**: A flag indicating that the video content contains additional views beyond the left or right eye.
